ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DEFENDANT GRANTED**
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-18-2025 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY MYBURGH, SONETTE AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-18-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $85. SERVED DEC-26-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM PLAINTIFF GRANTED**
SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) KELLY LINCOLN FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-18-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-18-2025 JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SONETTE MYBURGH IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MYBURGH, SONETTE
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MYBURGH, SONETTE
REMARK: DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED AT THE WINDOW VIA MESSENGER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MYBURGH, SONETTE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. THERE WAS A GLITCH BUT IT IS NO ONE'S FAULT. BURDEN OF PROOF IS ON THE PLAINTIFF AND IT WAS NOT MET. EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
